Package io.minio.messages

Class NotificationConfiguration

java.lang.Object
io.minio.messages.NotificationConfiguration
public class NotificationConfiguration extends Object
Request XML of PutBucketNotificationConfiguration API and response XML of GetBucketNotificationConfiguration API.
